zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Norton於1500年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯特亞特利時，他的父親John Norton17歲，母親Jane Cooper15歲。他於1525年與Miss Danie在英國英格蘭貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1583年3月10日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯特亞特利聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Norton于1500年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯特亞特利时，他的父亲John Norton17岁，母亲Jane Cooper15岁。他于1525年与Miss Danie在英国英格兰貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1583年3月10日在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯特亞特利聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Norton was born in 1500, in Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Norton, was 17 and his mother, Jane Cooper, was 15. He married Miss Danie in 1525, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 March 1583, in Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Miss Danie en 1525, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1583, à Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Norton(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Norton(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Cooper(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 Miss Danie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1583년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 스트 마가트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Norton nasceu em 1500, em Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Norton, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Jane Cooper, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss Danie em 1525, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1583, em Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of Saint Margaret, Streatley, Cen: ст маргарет'с чурч, стритли, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Norton родился в 1500 г. в местности стритли, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Norton было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Cooper, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss Danie в 1525 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 марта 1583 г. в местности шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, стритли, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Norton nació en 1500, en Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Norton, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Jane Cooper, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Miss Danie en 1525, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1583, en Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
